tiers.title: Asynchronous Network Foundations
tiers.summary: Coroutine pipelines, bounded concurrency, and rate-respecting schedulers that hold throughput under backpressure.

tiers.title: High-Performance Memory Management
tiers.summary: Generators, iterators, __slots__, and streaming parsers that chew through huge inputs without OOM.

tiers.title: Advanced Metaprogramming & Hooks
tiers.summary: Descriptors, class decorators, metaclasses, and context managers — bending the interpreter at runtime.

tiers.title: GIL Escape & Native Extensions
tiers.summary: Escape the GIL with multiprocessing, mount native code via ctypes, and measure real parallel speedup. Runs on the backend.
